diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,170 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: types from '../../types', Hono from '../../hono', HonoOptions from '../../hono-base'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/utils.ts (optional)
+- Safe summary: Factory helper for creating Hono apps with handler composition and middleware registration
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: Context from '../../context', GET_MATCH_RESULT from '../../request/constants', types from '../../types', getPattern and splitRoutingPath from '../../utils/url'
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/url.ts, src/request/constants.ts
+- Safe summary: Extracts and provides route path information from matched routes in the request
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSEvents, WSContext, UpgradeWebSocket, WSReadyState, WSMessageReceive, createWSMessageEvent
+- Reads as: Context from '../../context', types from '../../types', http-status from '../../utils/http-status'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Helper to create WebSocket handlers with event-driven architecture for Hono
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: Context from '../../context', parse/parseSigned/serialize from '../../utils/cookie'
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/cookie.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie getter/setter utilities including signed cookie support for Hono
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: hc from '../../client', types from '../../client/types', Context from '../../context', Hono, ExecutionContext
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Client for testing Hono applications with mock fetch support
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: Context from '../../context'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: Runtime detection and environment variable access for different execution environments
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style
+- Reads as: html from '../../helper/html', DOM_RENDERER from '../../jsx/constants', createCssJsxDomObjects from '../../jsx/dom/css', types and exports from './common'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/hook/jade/index.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper for runtime styling with class name hashing and keyframe support
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: rawCssString, minify, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
+- Reads as: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, various symbol constants
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Common CSS utility functions including class name hashing, minification, and common utilities
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, ProxyFetch
+- Reads as: types from '../../types/request.ts', HTTPException from '../../http-exception', headers from '../../utils/headers', knownUserAgents from '../../helper/adapter'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Proxy fetch wrapper with RFC 9110 header handling for forwarding requests
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: showRoutes, inspectRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: Hono, types from '../../types', color from '../../utils/color', isMiddleware from '../../utils/handler'
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/color.ts, src/utils/handler.ts
+- Safe summary: Development utilities for viewing routes and inspecting router name
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: html utilities from '../../utils/html'
+- Neighbor files: src/hook/jade/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Template string HTML rendering with escaping and callback resolution
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: all re-exports from './ssg', './middleware', './plugins'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Static Site Generation helper with built-in plugins for route rendering
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, toSSG, ToSSGResult, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface
+- Reads as: types from './middleware', utils from './utils', Hono, client utils
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/utils/concurrent.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation for fetching and saving static content to filesystem
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: Hono, findTargetHandler, isMiddleware from '../../utils/handler', METHOD_NAME_ALL
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/utils/handler.ts
+- Safe summary: File path utilities for SSG including segment handling and path filtering
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: isDynamicRoute from './utils', types from '../../types'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Middleware for controlling SSG execution with dynamic param support and content disabling
+
+## src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Main exports or names: defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: isSSGContext, isDynamicRoute from './middleware', types from '../../types'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Built-in SSG plugins for handling redirects and default route content
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, StreamingApi
+- Reads as: types from './sse' and './tex
